response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as IRyS from on-screen branding and visual appearance. 2. Identified the song 'Carbonated Love' via on-screen text. 3. Confirmed IRyS is the original artist. 4. Transcribed the lyrics from the video's on-screen display. 5. Segmented the video based on performance and talk segments.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a performance by the VTuber IRyS of her original song 'Carbonated Love', followed by an introductory segment and a promotional segment for merchandise.

scenes.description: IRyS introduces the song, dancing with a stick figure character.
IRyS performs her song 'Carbonated Love'. Lyrics appear on screen throughout.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
It's better than I could have dreamed
Look at what we've done, we're too extreme
Pour me your favorite drink, so much until we sink
Down to the bottom, don't wanna miss a thing
The track we're on might crash, oh what am I to do?
Rushing in, ignoring old avenues
Race through the night, my guiding light
Sparkling, I'm right here with you
Engine's hot, keeping up with the beat of my heart, just can't get enough
Revving up, make it fast, only us, make it last, till the sun's up
Nother' shot in the dark, take me away
Fizzing up in my heart, it's all okay
Accelerate me until I'm there
You and I reach the line, mark the end, but we'll
Keep on goin' until the bubbles fade
I don't care if I don't see another day
Shocking in my heart, give me all that you got
Windows down, don't hesitate a minute more
Time is up, not enough, fill it up, then look back again
Carbonated love

Come overflow my cup, I'm empty without you
Make such a mess of me, don't care if I'm the fool
Another night of bliss, the race begins, let's make it new
Let me defy the way, I'm crazy just for you
Engine's hot, keeping up with the beat of my heart, just can't get enough
Revving up, make it fast, only us, make it last, till the sun's up
Nother' shot in the dark, take me away
Fizzing up in my heart, it's all okay
Accelerate me until I'm there
You and I reach the line, mark the end, but we'll
Keep on goin' until the bubbles fade
I don't care if I don't see another day
Shocking in my heart, give me all that you got
Windows down, don't hesitate a minute more
Time is up, not enough, fill it up, then look back again
Carbonated love
Carbonated love

scenes.description: IRyS talks to the audience and introduces merchandise for her birthday.
